zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden於1488年出生在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey Audley35歲，母親Martha Isabell Wydeville35歲。他於1538年之前與Margaret Barnardiston結婚。他於1533年被列為lord chancellor of england 。他去世於1544年4月30日在英國英格蘭倫敦格林維其克里斯蒂 邱奇享年56歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden于1488年出生在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey Audley35岁，母亲Martha Isabell Wydeville35岁。他于1538年之前与Margaret Barnardiston结婚。他于1533年被列为lord chancellor of england 。他去世于1544年4月30日在英国英格兰倫敦格林維其克里斯蒂 邱奇享年56岁，埋葬在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden was born in 1488, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey Audley, was 35 and his mother, Martha Isabell Wydeville, was 35. He married Margaret Barnardiston before 1538. In 1533, his occupation is listed as lord chancellor of england . He died on 30 April 1544, in Christ Church, Greenwich, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden est né en 1488, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey Audley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Martha Isabell Wydeville, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Barnardiston avant 1538. En 1533, sa profession de son indiquée est lord chancellor of england . Il est décédé le 30 avril 1544, à Christ Church, Greenwich, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden è nato il nel 1488 nel Earls Colne, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey Audley, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Martha Isabell Wydeville, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Barnardiston prima del 1538. Nel 1533, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord chancellor of england . Morì il 30 aprile 1544, nel Christ Church, Greenwich, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Waldenが1488年にイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey Audleyは35歳，母Martha Isabell Wydevilleは35歳であった。1538年以前にMargaret Barnardistonと結婚した。1533年，職業はlord chancellor of england と記録されている。彼は1544年4月30日にイギリスイギリスロンドングレエンウィチチリスト チャーチで56歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden(이)가 1488년 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey Audley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Isabell Wydeville(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1538년 이전 Margaret Barnardiston(와)과 결혼했다. 1533년, 그의 직업은 lord chancellor of england 이었다. 그는 1544년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 그린위치 크리스트 c후르치에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden nasceu em 1488, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey Audley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Martha Isabell Wydeville, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Barnardiston antes 1538. Em 1533, sua profissão aparece como lord chancellor of england . Ele faleceu em 30 de abril de 1544, em Christ Church, Greenwich, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Audley 1st Baron Audley of Walden родился в 1488 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey Audley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Isabell Wydeville, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Barnardiston перед 1538 г. В 1533 году он работал по профессии lord chancellor of england . Он умер 30 апреля 1544 г. в местности краист чурч, гринвич, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Barnardiston antes de 1538. En 1533, su ocupación registrada era lord chancellor of england .
